import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/pages/platform-admin/AICortex.tsx");import { Fragment, jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/platform-admin/AICortex.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { useState } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";
import {
  Upload,
  Sparkles,
  Settings,
  RefreshCw,
  FileText,
  CheckCircle,
  Clock,
  AlertCircle,
  TrendingUp,
  Activity,
  Brain,
  Database,
  Zap,
  X,
  Plus,
  Trash2,
  Play
} from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=25293e4c";
import { PolicyEditorModal } from "/src/app/components/PolicyEditorModal.tsx";
import { GeneratePolicyModal } from "/src/app/components/GeneratePolicyModal.tsx";
const mockDocuments = [
  {
    id: "1",
    name: "Aged_Care_Act_2024_Amendment.pdf",
    size: "2.4 MB",
    uploadedDate: "2d ago",
    status: "indexed"
  },
  {
    id: "2",
    name: "NDIS_Practice_Standards_v4.pdf",
    size: "1.8 MB",
    uploadedDate: "5d ago",
    status: "indexed"
  },
  {
    id: "3",
    name: "Internal_Clinical_Governance.docx",
    size: "856 KB",
    uploadedDate: "1w ago",
    status: "training"
  }
];
const systemPrompts = [
  {
    id: "1",
    name: "System Prompt",
    description: "Core AI behavior and identity",
    content: "You are PolicyNest AI, an expert policy management assistant specializing in aged care, NDIS, and healthcare compliance. Always provide accurate, regulation-compliant responses.",
    lastUpdated: "2025-03-20"
  },
  {
    id: "2",
    name: "Tone & Style",
    description: "Communication guidelines",
    content: "Maintain a professional, clear, and helpful tone. Use plain language while preserving technical accuracy. Be concise but comprehensive.",
    lastUpdated: "2025-03-18"
  },
  {
    id: "3",
    name: "Safety & Compliance",
    description: "Guardrails and restrictions",
    content: "Never provide medical advice. Always cite sources. Flag high-risk policy changes. Maintain confidentiality. Defer to human experts for critical decisions.",
    lastUpdated: "2025-03-15"
  },
  {
    id: "4",
    name: "Citation Protocol",
    description: "How to reference sources",
    content: "Always cite document sources with version numbers. Use format: [Document Name v1.2 - Section 3.4]. Include confidence scores for all responses.",
    lastUpdated: "2025-03-12"
  }
];
export default function AICortex() {
  _s();
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("Training");
  const [uploadedDocs, setUploadedDocs] = useState(mockDocuments);
  const [isDragging, setIsDragging] = useState(false);
  const [isTraining, setIsTraining] = useState(false);
  const [showUploadModal, setShowUploadModal] = useState(false);
  const [showPromptModal, setShowPromptModal] = useState(false);
  const [showTestModal, setShowTestModal] = useState(false);
  const [selectedPrompt, setSelectedPrompt] = useState(null);
  const [testQuery, setTestQuery] = useState("");
  const [testResult, setTestResult] = useState(null);
  const [isTesting, setIsTesting] = useState(false);
  const [showPolicyEditor, setShowPolicyEditor] = useState(false);
  const [showGenerateModal, setShowGenerateModal] = useState(false);
  const [generatedContent, setGeneratedContent] = useState("");
  const [generatedTitle, setGeneratedTitle] = useState("");
  const handleDragOver = (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setIsDragging(true);
  };
  const handleDragLeave = () => {
    setIsDragging(false);
  };
  const handleDrop = (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setIsDragging(false);
    const files = Array.from(e.dataTransfer.files);
    handleUpload(files);
  };
  const handleUpload = (files) => {
    files.forEach((file) => {
      const newDoc = {
        id: String(Date.now() + Math.random()),
        name: file.name,
        size: `${(file.size / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1)} MB`,
        uploadedDate: "Just now",
        status: "processing"
      };
      setUploadedDocs([newDoc, ...uploadedDocs]);
      setTimeout(() => {
        setUploadedDocs(
          (prev) => prev.map(
            (doc) => doc.id === newDoc.id ? { ...doc, status: "indexed" } : doc
          )
        );
      }, 3e3);
    });
  };
  const handleFileSelect = (e) => {
    if (e.target.files) {
      handleUpload(Array.from(e.target.files));
    }
  };
  const handleTrainModel = () => {
    setIsTraining(true);
    setTimeout(() => {
      setIsTraining(false);
      alert("✅ AI Model trained successfully!\n\n• Indexed 3 new documents\n• Updated vector embeddings\n• Model ready for queries");
    }, 4e3);
  };
  const handleDeleteDoc = (docId) => {
    if (confirm("Remove this document from the training dataset?")) {
      setUploadedDocs(uploadedDocs.filter((doc) => doc.id !== docId));
      alert("Document removed from training dataset");
    }
  };
  const handleTestQuery = () => {
    setIsTesting(true);
    setTimeout(() => {
      setTestResult({
        output: "Based on the Aged Care Quality Standards, emergency evacuation procedures require all staff to follow designated exit routes and gather at assembly points. Fire wardens must conduct headcounts and report to emergency services.",
        confidence: 94,
        sources: [
          "Aged Care Quality Standards v2.4 - Section 3.1",
          "Fire Safety Protocol v1.8 - Section 2.3",
          "Emergency Response Plan v3.2 - Section 1.5"
        ],
        tokensUsed: 342,
        latency: "1.2s"
      });
      setIsTesting(false);
    }, 2e3);
  };
  const handleGeneratePolicy = (prompt, settings) => {
    const mockContent = `# Restrictive Practices (Physical) Policy

## Purpose
This policy outlines the governance framework and clinical oversight requirements for the use of physical restraints in aged care facilities, ensuring compliance with Aged Care Quality Standards and NDIS Practice Standards.

## Scope
This policy applies to all staff members, contractors, and volunteers involved in the care and support of residents.

## Legislative Framework
- Aged Care Quality Standards 2024 (Standard 3.3)
- NDIS Practice Standards (Core Module - Restrictive Practices)
- Commonwealth Aged Care Act 2024

## Policy Statement
Physical restraints shall only be used as a last resort when all other less restrictive options have been exhausted and documented.

## Procedures

### 1. Assessment
All restrictive practice proposals must undergo comprehensive assessment including:
- Functional behavior assessment
- Medical review
- Risk assessment
- Alternative strategy evaluation

### 2. Authorization
Physical restraints require:
- Written approval from authorized medical practitioner
- Informed consent from resident or authorized representative
- Approval from facility Clinical Governance Committee

### 3. Implementation
When physical restraints are used:
- Minimum restrictive duration
- Continuous monitoring (15-minute intervals)
- Documentation in clinical records
- Immediate reporting to management

### 4. Review
Ongoing reviews must occur:
- Daily assessment of continued need
- Weekly multidisciplinary team review
- Monthly clinical governance review
- Quarterly external audit

## Responsibilities
- **Clinical Manager**: Overall policy implementation and compliance
- **Registered Nurses**: Assessment, documentation, and monitoring
- **Care Staff**: Implementation and immediate reporting
- **Quality Team**: Audit and continuous improvement

## References
- Aged Care Quality Standards v2.4 - Section 3.3
- NDIS Restrictive Practices Framework 2023
- WHO Guidelines on Physical Restraint Reduction

## Review
This policy will be reviewed annually or when legislative changes require updates.

---
*Generated by PolicyNest AI on ${(/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toLocaleDateString()}*`;
    setGeneratedTitle("Restrictive Practices (Physical) Policy");
    setGeneratedContent(mockContent);
    setShowPolicyEditor(true);
  };
  const handleSavePolicy = (data) => {
    console.log("Policy saved:", data);
    setGeneratedContent("");
    setGeneratedTitle("");
    alert("✅ Policy saved to Golden Library!");
  };
  const indexedCount = uploadedDocs.filter((d) => d.status === "indexed").length;
  const processingCount = uploadedDocs.filter((d) => d.status === "processing" || d.status === "training").length;
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "dw2u0", _fgB: 1779104380427, _fgD: true, className: "space-y-6", "data-fg-dw2u0": "418.269:772.119:/src/app/pages/platform-admin/AICortex.tsx:267:5:8457:28480:e:div:xtetxtetxtetxtxtxtxtxtxtxtxtxtxtxtetxte:1", children: [
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "dw2u2", _fgB: 1779104380427, className: "flex items-center justify-between", "data-fg-dw2u2": "418.269:772.119:/src/app/pages/platform-admin/AICortex.tsx:269:7:8512:661:e:div:ete", children: [
